user_query: I run a travel agency that features artisan souvenirs in our tour packages. Please audit the two provided HTML pages for basic on-page SEO and clarity, then produce optimized snippets, concise rewrites of two draft messages, and actionable meeting notes for our web team. Use only the files in input/ and save all outputs under output/. Inputs: - input/site_pages/landing.html - input/site_pages/artisan_day_tour.html - input/keywords.yaml - input/messages/internal_update_draft.txt - input/messages/partner_email_draft.txt Deliverables: 1) SEO audit report (output/reports/seo_audit_report.md): For each HTML page, create a separate section with these fields clearly labeled: - page_path - title_text and title_length - meta_description_present (true/false) and meta_description_length if present - h1_count - h2_count - images_missing_alt_count (count tags with missing or empty alt) - keyword_counts: a mapping for each keyword from input/keywords.yaml showing occurrences in visible text (case-insensitive, exclude tags/attributes) - notes: 3–6 bullet-point observations about structure and clarity (e.g., duplicate H1s, very long titles, missing meta description) - recommended_fixes: 3–6 bullet-point, actionable suggestions tied to the issues you found Cross-check requirement: Every page that appears in optimized_snippets.csv (see #2) must have a corresponding section here with matching page_path. 2) Optimized snippets (output/snippets/optimized_snippets.csv): One row per input HTML page with columns: page_path, new_title, new_meta_description, new_h1. Constraints: - new_title <= 60 characters and includes at least one keyword from input/keywords.yaml - new_meta_description <= 160 characters and summarizes the page in natural language - new_h1 <= 70 characters and should not be identical to new_title - Provide exactly one row for each of the two input HTML pages 3) Message rewrites (save to output/messages/): Rewrite both drafts for tone, clarity, and brevity in a friendly, professional voice. Each rewrite must be <= 180 words and self-contained (no attachments or links assumed). Filenames: - output/messages/internal_update_draft_clean.txt (rewrite of input/messages/internal_update_draft.txt) - output/messages/partner_email_draft_clean.txt (rewrite of input/messages/partner_email_draft.txt) 4) Web team meeting notes with action items (output/notes/web_team_meeting_notes.md): Prepare concise meeting notes that summarize key findings and list prioritized actions. Requirements: - 5–8 action items labeled P1/P2/P3 by priority - Each action item must reference the affected page_path and include an acceptance criterion tied to a measurable outcome from your audit (e.g., “Add a meta description <=160 chars to landing.html”). - A brief agenda (3–5 bullets) and next steps owner placeholders (e.g., Design, Dev, Content) Analysis rules: - Consider only the provided HTML files and keywords. Count keywords in visible text only (ignore HTML tags and attributes). Treat counts as case-insensitive. - Identify missing or empty alt attributes for images. - Do not fetch anything from the internet. Outputs must be created exactly at the specified paths and reflect the content of the inputs. Make sure the number of pages covered in optimized_snippets.csv equals the number of input HTML files and that the audit report covers the same pages. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
